---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new entity type, document context, or capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

What would you like pw-redact to do?

## Use Case

What financial services workflow does this support?

## Proposed Implementation

If applicable, suggest how this could work:

- [ ] New regex pattern in `regex_patterns.py`
- [ ] New Presidio recognizer in `financial_recognizers.py`
- [ ] New allow-list entry in `allow_list.py`
- [ ] New document context
- [ ] New API endpoint or parameter
- [ ] Other

## Example

```
Input:  "text containing the entity you want detected"
Output: "text with <NEW_ENTITY_1> placeholder"
```

## Additional Context

Are there specific financial regulations or compliance requirements driving this request?
